body.title: Check Granny behavior after CC launch wiring
body.result: fixed: daemon used nonexistent --json flag on list; CC spawn now includes --dangerously-skip-permissions
body.description:
After T-granny-cc-launch shipped, Granny appeared to trigger a full install instead of a sprint. Investigate: does "claude -p /sprint-ticket T-xxx" run correctly in a fresh tmux session? Check if the claude binary is in PATH, if the UU working dir is correct, and if any install/setup steps fire unexpectedly on first launch. May need --no-install flag or different claude invocation.

**Affected files:** devices/granny/dispatch.py
**Design rules:** no-env-var-required
**Scope boundary:** diagnose and fix CC launch command; do not change sprint-ticket skill
**Test plan:** manually verify tmux session runs /sprint-ticket correctly on a test ticket
